purpose: Evidence that the versioned timezone_mode=iana V2.2 context path builds reproducibly, is starter-independent, never accesses the 2025 holdout, and leaves every existing standard_offset artifact byte-unchanged.

iana_context_identities.identity_method: sha256(canonical_json_bytes(value)); canonical = sort_keys, compact separators; scientific_identity = sha256 over {features_identity, timezone_provenance}

two_independent_builds.note: Build 1 and Build 2 were run as independent isolated processes; both features files and both coverage files are byte-for-byte identical.

timezone_provenance.isolation: force_tzdata_only() calls zoneinfo.reset_tzpath(to=[]) then ZoneInfo.clear_cache() inside the offline build entry point ONLY; never mutated at module import.

unchanged_reference_artifacts.verification_method: git working tree clean except two NEW untracked files (nrfi/context_features_iana.py, tests/test_context_features_iana.py); no existing source or doc modified. venue_reference.json re-hashed on disk and matches the frozen value.
unchanged_reference_artifacts.park_terminal_timezone_independence: The park terminal projection is a function of venue identity and first-inning run counts only (no schedule clock/timezone input), so it is correctly unaffected by the IANA timezone repair and remains byte-identical.

availability_safe_prior_policy.ordering: sort admitted priors by (label_available_at, scheduled_start_at, game_number, game_pk); never ordered solely by official_date
availability_safe_prior_policy.doubleheader_policy: first DH game becomes a prior for the second only when first.label_available_at <= second.prediction_cutoff
availability_safe_prior_policy.suspended_resumed_policy: availability boundary is label_available_at; games not complete-and-available by the cutoff are rejected (prior_rejected_after_cutoff_count) while official_date and scheduled_start_at are preserved separately
availability_safe_prior_policy.strict_prior_park_self_exclusion: explicit source.game_pk != target.game_pk enforced in addition to the label check; proven by tests/test_context_features_iana.py::test_park_factor_excludes_malformed_self_target using a malformed target whose label_available_at precedes its own cutoff
availability_safe_prior_policy.self_inclusion_guard: admitted_prior_games hard-fails with ContextFeatureError(TARGET_ENTERED_OWN_PRIOR_HISTORY) if the target ever enters its own history

starter_independence.guard: _assert_starter_independent() runs over every emitted feature_values mapping; build fails closed on any forbidden substring
